title: ActiveCampaign vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best email marketing tool for your business.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Campaign Monitor: Complete Comparison
intro: Both ActiveCampaign and Campaign Monitor are established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. ActiveCampaign excels in automation and CRM capabilities, while Campaign Monitor focuses on design and multi-brand management. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your business needs and budget.
choose_a_if: You need advanced automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities
SMS marketing and site tracking are important for your business
You want an integrated CRM within your email platform
You prioritize higher user ratings and reviews
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts
You want the lowest starting price with quality features
Email design and visual campaign builders are your priority

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses needing advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring, with higher G2 ratings (4.5 vs 4.1). Campaign Monitor is better for agencies managing multiple brands and those prioritizing design-focused email creation. Consider your specific feature requirements and budget.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month, making it $4 cheaper than ActiveCampaign's $15/month entry price. However, final costs depend on your subscriber count and features needed, so compare full pricing at higher tiers before deciding.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and integration with other tools. Most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign history. Both ActiveCampaign and Campaign Monitor offer onboarding support to help migrate your data during the transition.
